zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Whalesborough於1422年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾華阿萊斯波洛時，她的父親Sir Thomas Whalesborough14歲，母親Lady Matilda Bowes15歲。她於1445年與Sir William Lunsford在英國素可易亞斯特 霍阿利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1498年1月16日在英國可瓦爾華阿萊斯波洛享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Whalesborough于1422年出生在英国英格兰可瓦爾華阿萊斯波洛时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Whalesborough14岁，母亲Lady Matilda Bowes15岁。她于1445年与Sir William Lunsford在英国素可易亞斯特 霍阿利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1498年1月16日在英国可瓦爾華阿萊斯波洛享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Whalesborough was born in 1422, in Whalesborough, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Thomas Whalesborough, was 14 and her mother, Lady Matilda Bowes, was 15. She married Sir William Lunsford in 1445, in East Hoathly, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 16 January 1498, in Whalesborough, Cornwall, England, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Whalesborough est née en 1422, à Whalesborough, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Whalesborough, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Lady Matilda Bowes, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Lunsford en 1445, à East Hoathly, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 janvier 1498, à Whalesborough, Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Whalesborough 1422 in Whalesborough, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Whalesborough 14 und ihre Mutter Lady Matilda Bowes 15. Sie hat 1445 in East Hoathly, Sussex, England Sir William Lunsford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. Januar 1498 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Whalesborough, Cornwall, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Whalesborough è nata il nel 1422 nel Whalesborough, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Thomas Whalesborough, aveva 14 anni e sua madre, Lady Matilda Bowes, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Lunsford nel 1445, nel East Hoathly, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 16 gennaio 1498, nel Whalesborough, Cornwall, England, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Whalesboroughが1422年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルウイレスボロウで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Whalesboroughは14歳，母Lady Matilda Bowesは15歳であった。1445年にイギリススセックスエアスト ホーアスリーでSir William Lunsfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1498年1月16日にイギリスコルンワルウイレスボロウで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Whalesborough(이)가 1422년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 화알스버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Whalesborough(은)는 14세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Matilda Bowes(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1445년 영국 수세스 이스트 호슬리에서 Sir William Lunsford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1498년 1월 16일 영국 코른월 화알스버루그h에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Whalesborough nasceu em 1422, em Whalesborough, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas Whalesborough, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Lady Matilda Bowes, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Lunsford em 1445, em East Hoathly, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de janeiro de 1498, em Whalesborough, Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Whalesborough родилась в 1422 г. в местности уэлесбороую, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Whalesborough было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Matilda Bowes, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Lunsford в 1445 г. в местности эаст хоатли, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 16 января 1498 г. в местности уэлесбороую, корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth Whalesborough nació en 1422, en Whalesborough, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas Whalesborough, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Lady Matilda Bowes, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Sir William Lunsford en 1445, en East Hoathly, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 16 de enero de 1498, en Whalesborough, Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años.
